title: Dashboard reads product-spine objects before UI work
decision: Dashboard/API/runtime skills must read stable memory, source, eval, proposal, decision, and compact checkpoint objects before any dashboard UI is built.
rationale: The canonical product direction rejects dashboard-first vanity metrics and requires owner/action/source/failure-mode objects.
alternatives_rejected: Build dashboard UI directly over markdown.
Expose broad write-capable API/MCP before read-only object contracts.
Treat eval reports as productivity proof without review context.
risk_if_wrong: KRN may over-invest in schemas and delay the first useful UI feedback loop.
review_trigger: Revisit after the first read-only API/MCP prototype or dashboard object model.
